changelog: Initial release - Complete LLM deployment expertise
Support for vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Ollama, llama.cpp, TGI, FastChat
Added vLLM-Ascend support for Huawei Ascend NPU
Added MindIE deployment guide for Ascend NPU
Added hardware platform selection guide (NVIDIA GPU vs Ascend NPU)
Added Kimi-K2.5 deployment guide for Ascend NPU with vLLM-Ascend
